name: Hidden Paragon
description:
Frequency once per hour

Trigger You successfully use Stealth to and become from all of your current foes, or use Stealth to and become to all your current foes.

When you slip out of sight, you disappear. You become for 1 minute, even if you use a hostile action. Not even , , or similar effects can reveal you, though creatures can still use the action to locate you as normal.
